title: B.C.A.
description: A three-year undergraduate programme building foundations in computer science, programming, networking and software development. Ideal for students who wish to enter the IT industry or pursue higher education in computer science.

semesters.label: Semester I
subjects: Language I – Com. English & Gen. Proficiency

semesters.label: Semester II
subjects: Language I – Com. English & Gen. Proficiency

title: B.Com
combinations: All compulsory subjects | Elective: HRM or Business Taxation
description: A comprehensive three-year programme covering accountancy, business law, economics, banking, finance, taxation and management. Prepares students for commerce, finance, banking and entrepreneurship careers, or CA / MBA / MCom higher studies.

semesters.label: Semester III
subjects: Elective – HRM I / Business Taxation I

semesters.label: Semester IV
subjects: Elective – HRM II / Business Taxation II

semesters.label: Semester V
subjects: Elective – HRM III / Business Taxation III

semesters.label: Semester VI
subjects: Elective – HRM IV / Business Taxation IV

title: B.Sc.
combinations: PCM: Physics · Chemistry · Mathematics | BZC: Botany · Zoology · Chemistry
description: A rigorous three-year science programme with two combinations — PCM (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics) and BZC (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry). Prepares students for research, education, medicine and engineering, or MSc / competitive exam preparation.

semesters.label: Semester I
subjects: Language I – Communicative English & Gen. Proficiency

semesters.label: Semester II
subjects: Language I – Communicative English & Gen. Proficiency
Mathematics – Calculus, Analytical Geometry & Number Theory

semesters.label: Semester III
subjects: Language I – Communicative English & Gen. Proficiency
Mathematics – Differential Equations, Functions of Several Variables & Complex Variables

semesters.label: Semester IV
subjects: Language I – Communicative English & Gen. Proficiency
Mathematics – Multiple Integrals, Group Theory & Infinite Sequence & Series
Botany – Morphology of Angiosperms, Taxonomy & Economic Botany
Zoology – Histology, Animal Behaviour, Applied Zoology & Toxicology

semesters.label: Semester V
subjects: Botany (V) – Plant Physiology I & Ecology I
Botany (VI) – Cell Biology, Molecular Biology & Genetics

semesters.label: Semester VI
subjects: Mathematics (VII) – Partial Differential Equations, Fourier Series & Algebra
Botany (VII) – Plant Physiology II & Ecology II
Botany (VIII) – Plant Anatomy, Microbiology, Bio-Technology & Plant Propagation

title: B.A.
combinations: HEP: History · Economics · Political Science | HEK: History · Economics · Optional Kannada
description: A versatile three-year programme in humanities and social sciences covering History, Economics, Political Science and Languages. Develops critical thinking and analytical skills — ideal for civil services, teaching, journalism and law. Open to all streams.

title: B.Sc. Interior Design
fullName: Bachelor of Science in Interior Design & Decoration
combinations: Streams Accepted: Science / Commerce / Arts / Diploma / ITI
description: A creative and technical three-year programme blending design aesthetics, spatial planning and materials science. Open to students from Science, Commerce and Arts streams. The only Interior Design programme in Bantwal Taluk.

semesters.label: Programme Highlights
subjects: Industry visits and live project exposure
